seed_problem: N/A (novel family, wave2b spec fsx_S_0956): a starship-refinery module catalog with typed conversions, footprint budgets, and byproduct outputs.
mutation: input+output: the catalog is not a plain DAG of conversions; some modules emit a byproduct of their OWN input type, so a valid solution is a typed flow network (not a path) that may contain self-feeding cycles, verified by explicit per-instance conservation instead of a canonical answer.
theme: starship refinery built from a parts catalog
title: Autocatalytic Refinery: Byproduct Loops Under a Footprint Budget
strategies: naive chain: instantiate the first catalog-listed module for every hop 0->1->...->K-1, ignore byproducts entirely
ratio-greedy knapsack: pick, per hop, the module with the best raw conversion ratio subject to the footprint budget (DP), still ignoring byproducts

loop-aware knapsack: for every candidate module compute its EFFECTIVE ratio (out_ratio/(1-byproduct_gain) when the byproduct feeds its own input), then run the same footprint-budget DP over effective ratios and wire the discovered self-loops
local search: perturb a loop-aware solution's module choices and footprint allocation, keep improvements
